title: Goodbye, Summer Days
overview: Shinpei returns home for his friend Ushio's funeral. She apparently drowned, but something is off.

title: Shadows
overview: To find out the truth about Ushio's death, Shinpei and Mio head to Hiruko.

title: Drifting Ashore
overview: After being stabbed by Mio's shadow, Shinpei regains consciousness at the docks on July 22nd.

title: Jamais-vu
overview: Ushio's shadow appears before Shinpei at the summer festival.

title: Maelstrom
overview: A giant shadow massacres everyone at the Hitogashima Summer Festival and engulfs the whole island.

title: Orbital Resonance
overview: Hizuru Minakata, the woman on the ferry, returns to Hitogashima Island hoping to solve a mystery.

title: Deadly Enemy
overview: In order to defeat the Kobayakawa's shadows, Shinpei and Hizuru join forces with Nezu.

title: Memento
overview: Mio's shadow appears before Shinpei and threatens him with a knife.

title: My Flowing Tears
overview: In a video, Ushio and her shadow recount their encounter up to the moment the video is recorded.

title: Into the Darkness
overview: Shinpei gains clues on Mount Takanosu since Ushio and her shadow had gone there.

title: Dinner Time
overview: Ushio, Sou and Shinpei are surrounded by shadows.

title: Bloody Night
overview: Tokiko, Sou's younger sister, reveals she has been offering corpses as food to Hiruko.

title: Friends
overview: It is the fifth July 22nd for Shinpei. Hizuru takes time to process that Shinpei is a time traveler.

title: To Be/Not to Be
overview: Shinpei finds himself in Hizuru's memories from fourteen years ago.

title: Lights Camera Action
overview: Heine, who loops like Shinpei, realizes the pattern of behavior when a new loop begins.

title: Original
overview: Mio proposes to turn the shadows into allies.

title: Determination
overview: Shinpei hears about Shide's identity from Sou's father, Director of Hishigata Clinic.

title: Face to Face
overview: A seventy-year-old photograph reveals the truth.

title: Made in Black
overview: Karikiri and Heine strike. Mio and Hizuru learn of Ushio's death.

title: All is (not) Lost.
overview: Hizuru and Karikiri face off, while Gil and Rose enter the fray.

title: Shinpei Ajiro's Longest Day
overview: Shinpei despairs over Hizuru's death. However, hope is on the horizon.

title: Return
overview: Ushio fully comes back to life. Shinpei heads to Hiruko's grotto.

title: Everlasting Night
overview: After slicing down Heine, Shide brings Shinpei and Ushio to her home.

title: Summertime Re-Rendering
overview: After a fierce battle, Shinpei takes the place of an exhausted Ushio and confronts Shide.

title: [I'm Home]
overview: Shide is gone and Ushio's final iteration must vanish. Shinpei comes to on the morning of July 22nd.
